message:
feat(ext4): strict ext4 directory block validation + conformance fixtures

Tightens ext4 directory-block parsing so malformed on-disk layouts are
rejected with a precise error instead of being silently tolerated, and
adds eight negative-path conformance fixtures that exercise each of the
new rejection paths end-to-end through `ffs-harness`.

ffs-ondisk (`crates/ffs-ondisk/src/ext4.rs`)
- `verify_dir_block_checksum`: require the 12-byte checksum tail
  (`det_reserved_zero1` = 0, `det_rec_len` = 12, `det_reserved_zero2` = 0,
  `det_reserved_ft` = EXT4_FT_DIR_CSUM) to be present and well-formed,
  returning `ParseError::InvalidField { field: "dir_block_tail", reason:
  "missing or malformed checksum tail" }` when it is not.
- `parse_dir_block` and `DirBlockIter::next_raw`:
    * enforce 4-byte alignment of `de_rec_len` for block sizes up to
      64 KiB (the range where ext4 does not repurpose the low bits);
    * raise the lower bound on `de_rec_len` from 8 to 12 so an entry
      always has room for the on-disk header the kernel writes.
- Minor rustfmt reflow in the HTree leaf-scan collision loop.

ffs-journal (`crates/ffs-journal/src/lib.rs`)
- Replace `map_or(false, |sb| sb.has_checksum())` with the clippy-preferred
  `is_some_and(Jbd2Superblock::has_checksum)`; small rustfmt touch-ups in
  the descriptor-tag-count path. Pure refactor, no behavior change.

ffs-dir (`crates/ffs-dir/src/lib.rs`)
- rustfmt reflow of the HTree collision test fixture; no logic change.

ffs-harness (`crates/ffs-harness/tests/conformance.rs`)
- Wires up the eight new strict negative fixtures so each fault path is
  covered end-to-end.

conformance/fixtures
- New strict fixtures (with checksums.sha256 updated):
    ext4_dir_block_deleted_entry.json
    ext4_dir_block_name_len_overflow.json
    ext4_dir_block_rec_len_too_small.json
    ext4_dir_block_rec_len_too_small_min12.json
    ext4_dir_block_rec_len_unaligned.json
    ext4_dir_block_tail_bad_header.json
    ext4_dir_block_tail_padding_nonzero.json
    ext4_dir_block_truncated_tail.json
